inputs.$description: Shared base styles for all form input components: text inputs, selects, text areas, etc.

background-color.$description: The background colour is set explicitly to our general background colour.

border-color.$description: Uses currentColor so the border adapts to the text colour, including in error states.

border-width.$description: The borders have a medium thickness.

color.$description: Inputs use the default text colour.

font-family.$description: Inputs use our single font family.

font-size.$description: Inputs use the same font size as body text.

font-weight.$description: Inputs use the same font weight as body text.

line-height.$description: Tighter than body text (1.6) to keep inputs compact. Buttons also use this to match.

outline-offset.$description: The offset for the focus outline reuses the general token for it.

padding-block.$description: Small vertical whitespace between the borders and content.

padding-inline.$description: Medium horizontal whitespace between the borders and content.

color.$description: The text colour of a disabled input uses our general colour for this state.

box-shadow.$description: An inset shadow that reinforces the border on hover without shifting the layout.

border-color.$description: The border uses the invalid interactive colour.
On hover, the border uses the hover variant of the invalid interactive colour.

box-shadow.$description: An inset shadow using the hover variation of the invalid interactive colour.

color.$description: Placeholder text uses the secondary text colour.
